sections.sectionTitle: Thuciamna Singkuang a la David Pai

verses.text: David in Israel-te a kiteelkhia mi tul sawmthum khawmkik hi
Tua ciangin David in kherub-te tungah a tu, Vanglian Topa' min tawh a kisam Pasian' Thuciamna Singkuang tua mun panin a paipihto dingin amah tawh a om mi khempeuh tawh Baalejudah-ah a pai hi

Amaute in leeng thak khat tungah Pasian' Thuciamna Singkuang pua uh a, mualtunga om Abinadab' inn panin paikhiatpih uh hi. Abinadab' tapate Uzzah leh Ahio in leeng thak tungah Pasian' Thuciamna Singkuang koihin hawl uh a, Thuciamna Singkuang mai-ah Ahio a pai hi

Tua ciangin David leh Israel mite khempeuh in Topa' mai-ah a tha neih zahun la sa-in, laia khausai lasaknate, harp khausai lasaknate, khuangneute, kuangtuahte, leh daltuahte tumin lungdamin a lam uh hi
Nakon' ancilna mun a tun' uh ciangin bawngtalte muktu ahih manin Uzzah in Pasian' Thuciamna Singkuang lamah a khut zanin len kha hi
Tua ciangin Uzzah tungah Topa hong sinso hi. Amah in Thuciamna Singkuang lamah a khut zan ahih manin Pasian in tua lai-ah amah vatlum a, Pasian' Thuciamna Singkuang gei-ah amah si hi
Topa in Uzzah gimpia ahih manin David heh hi. Tuni dongin tua mun pen Perezuzzah kici hi
Tua ahih ciangin tua ni-in David in Topa kihta hi. Amah in, “ Topa' Thuciamna Singkuang bangci-in ka kiangah hong tung thei ding ahi hiam?” a ci hi
Tua ahih ciangin David khuapi sungah Topa' Thuciamna Singkuang a paipih ding David utlo a, Gath khua mi Obededom' inn-ah paipih hi
Topa' Thuciamna Singkuang Gath khua mi Obededom' inn sungah kha thum sung om a, Topa in Obededom leh a innkuan khempeuh thupha a pia hi.

Tua ciangin Kumpi David kiangah, “Pasian' Thuciamna Singkuang hangin Topa in Obededom innkuan leh ama neih khempeuh thupha pia hi,” ci-in kigen hi. Tua ahih ciangin David pai-in Obededom' inn panin David khuapi-ah lungdamna tawh Pasian' Thuciamna Singkuang paipihto hi
Topa' Thuciamna Singkuang a puate kal guk a suan khit ciangin amah in a puate tawlkhat khawlsakin bawngtal khat leh bawngno thau khat biakna-in a pia hi
Tua ciangin a tha neih khempeuh tawh Topa' mai-ah David lam hi. David in saihadial siampipuan khat silh hi
Tua ahih ciangin David leh Israel mi khempeuh in otna leh saki tumna awging tawh Topa' Thuciamna Singkuang paipihto uh hi

Topa' Thuciamna Singkuang David khuapi sung hong tun' laitakin tawlet panin Saul tanu a zi Mikhal hong khuadak a, Topa' mai-ah Kumpi David diangin a lam mu hi. Tuanu in a lungsim sungah amah simmawh hi

Tua ciangin amaute in Topa' Thuciamna Singkuang hong tumpih uh a, David in ama-a' dingin a lamsak puanbuk sung ama mun dingah a koih hi. Tua ciangin David in Topa' mai-ah meihal biaknate leh thunuama biaknate a pia hi
David in meihal biaknate leh thunuama biaknate a piak khit ciangin amah in Vanglian Topa' min tawh mite thupha pia a
Israel mihon buppi, mi khempeuh, numei leh pasalte tungah anlum pheng khat, sa baak khat, leh leenggahkeu pheng khat ciat a pia hi. Tua ciangin mi khempeuh a inn ciat uhah a ciah uh hi

Tua ciangin a innkuante thupha a pia dingin David a ciah hi. Ahih hangin David a dawn dingin Saul' tanu Mikhal hong paikhia a, “Tuni-in Israel kumpipa, mi mawkmawkte khat maizum loin a guak om bangin, a nasemte' numeite' muhna-ah tuni-in a tangguakin omin, amahmah bangci kipahtawi ahi hiam?” a ci hi

Tua ciangin David in Mikhal kiangah, “ Topa' mi Israel-te tungah ulian dingin a hong koih dingin na pa leh a innkuan khempeuhte sangin kei a hong teelzaw Topa' mai ahi hi. Keimah in Topa' mai-ah lungdamna ka bawl ding hi
Hih sangin a simmawhhuai zaw-in ka kibawl lai ding a, nangma mit bekah a ginalo ka hi ding hi. Ahih hangin nangma gen numeite in keimah hong pahtawi ding uh hi,” a ci hi
Tua ahih ciangin Saul' tanu Mikhal in a sih ni dongin ta nei thei nawnlo hi.
